product.name: Sun-Kissed Apricots
product.shortDesc: Tender, velvety apricots with a honey-kissed stone-fruit finish.
product.longDesc: These apricots are grown in the mineral-rich soils of our Okanagan partner orchard and harvested by hand at peak ripeness. High in beta-carotene, potassium, and natural antioxidants. Their honey-sweet, slightly tart profile makes them exceptional for fresh eating, preserves, or artisan cheese pairings.

product.name: Organic Ruby Strawberries
product.shortDesc: Sweet, vibrant red strawberries freshly hand-picked from the vine.
product.longDesc: Cultivated in the sun-drenched valleys of our organic partner orchards, our ruby strawberries are incredibly sweet, juicy, and packed with Vitamin C. Hand-harvested in small batches every morning at peak ripeness to ensure optimal sugars and deep, rich aroma.

product.name: Organic Ruby Strawberries
product.shortDesc: Sweet, vibrant red strawberries freshly hand-picked from the vine.
product.longDesc: Cultivated in the sun-drenched valleys of our organic partner orchards, our ruby strawberries are incredibly sweet, juicy, and packed with Vitamin C. Hand-harvested in small batches every morning at peak ripeness to ensure optimal sugars and deep, rich aroma.

product.name: Artisan Wildflower Honey
product.shortDesc: Raw, unpasteurized honey gathered from pristine wild meadows.
product.longDesc: Harvested by multi-generational beekeepers from pristine wild flower fields, our wildflower honey is completely raw, cold-filtered, and untreated. This preserves all natural enzymes, floral pollens, and a complex, exquisite depth of flavor.
